allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./wod-tracker/data/wods.json'\); console.log\('Count:', d.length\); console.log\('First:', JSON.stringify\(d[0], null, 2\)\); console.log\('Last:', JSON.stringify\(d[d.length-1], null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./wod-tracker/data/wods.json'\); const names=new Set\(d.map\(w=>w.name\)\); const open=d.filter\(w=>w.kategorie==='CrossFit Open'\).map\(w=>w.name\); console.log\('Open WODs count:', open.length\); console.log\('Open WODs:', open.slice\(0,30\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Max ID:', Math.max\(...d.map\(w=>parseInt\(w.id\)\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./wod-tracker/add_wods.js','utf8'\); const mA=s.match\(/const blockA = \\[[\\s\\S]*?\\];/\); const mB=s.match\(/const blockB = \\[[\\s\\S]*?\\];/\); console.log\('blockA lines:', \(mA?.[0]||''\).split\('\\n'\).length\); console.log\('blockB lines:', \(mB?.[0]||''\).split\('\\n'\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./wod-tracker/data/wods.json'\); const cats=[...new Set\(d.map\(w=>w.kategorie\)\)]; cats.forEach\(c=>console.log\(c+': '+d.filter\(w=>w.kategorie===c\).length\)\); console.log\('\\nTotal:', d.length\);")
